creator: magik@roorback.net
text:
EFL libraries was updated to 1.0.0
Enlightenment and Elementary was updated to snapshot from 2010-12-03
modules and additional apps was updated to snapshot from 2011-01-29

Also I ported next four ports: empris, itask, news, winlist-ng
and weather module now is working.


Patch: http://files.roorback.net/e17/2011-01-29/e17-20110129.diff
